original_frontmatter_snapshot.name: nx-ci-monitor
original_frontmatter_snapshot.description: Monitor Nx Cloud CI pipeline status and handle self-healing fixes automatically. Use when user says "watch CI", "monitor pipeline", "check CI status", "fix CI failures", or "self-heal CI". Requires Nx Cloud connection. Do NOT use for local task execution (use nx-run-tasks) or general CI debugging outside Nx Cloud.
